title: Spajanje Stringova Plus Operatorom

solutions.name: script
solutions.contents: const myStr = "This is the start. " + "This is the end.";
solutions.seed: const myStr = "This is the start. " + "This is the end.";

tests.text: myStr treba da ima jedan razmak izmedju dva stringa.
myStr treba da ima vrednost stringa This is the start. This is the end.
tests.testString: assert(myStr === 'This is the start. This is the end.');

tests.text: myStr treba da bude napravljen koristeci kljucnu rec const.

description:
U JavaScript-u, kada se operator + koristi nad String vrednostima, to se zove konkatenacija. Mozete napraviti novi string spajanjem drugih stringova.

Mfano

'My name is Alan,' + ' I concatenate.'

Napomena: Obratite paznju na razmake. Konkatenacija ne dodaje razmake izmedju stringova, pa ih morate dodati sami.

Mfano:

const ourStr = "I come first. " + "I come second.";

String I come first. I come second. bice ispisan u konzoli.
instructions: Napravite myStr od stringova This is the start. i This is the end. koristeci operator +. Obavezno ubacite razmak izmedju ta dva stringa.
